title: F2-apply-fabric-hint: replace 5 hardcoded banners in fabric-hint.cjs with banner-i18n lib calls
description: Replace the five hardcoded banner string literals at lines 614 (Signal A line1), 619-621 (Signal A activity + cta), 651-652 (Signal B), 697-698 (Signal C), and 929-932 (Signal D вҖ” both `д»ҺжңӘиҝҗиЎҢ lint жЈҖжҹҘ` and `е·І N еӨ©жңӘи·‘ lint жЈҖжҹҘ` branches) with `renderBanner(...)` calls into the lib from TASK-001. Read the workspace's `fabric_language` ONCE per `main()` invocation via `readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot)` and thread the variant down through the signal-evaluation functions OR resolve at the call site. Preserve every substring the existing tests assert on (`'25.0h'`-style numeric formats, `'йҳҲеҖј N'`, `'${count} жқЎ'`, `'${nodeCount}/${threshold}'`, `'fabric-archive'`, `'fabric-review'`, `'fabric-import'`, `'fabric doctor --lint'`, `'д»ҺжңӘиҝҗиЎҢ lint жЈҖжҹҘ'`, `'е·І N еӨ©жңӘи·‘ lint'`).

files.change: Add `const { renderBanner, readFabricLanguage } = require('./lib/banner-i18n.cjs');` near the top of the file alongside other lib requires. In `main()` (or equivalent entry), resolve `const variant = readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot);` and pass it into each signal evaluator. Replace each hardcoded banner block with a `renderBanner(key, variant, params)` call. Substring contracts MUST be preserved in the en/zh-CN templates.

implementation: Add require for `./lib/banner-i18n.cjs` at the top of fabric-hint.cjs in the lib-require section
In `main()` (or the entry that resolves CONFIG_FILE), call `readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot)` once and capture into a `variant` local
Thread `variant` into the four signal-evaluation paths (archive at ~614, review at ~651, import at ~697, maintenance at ~929)
Replace each banner string-construction block with `renderBanner(key, variant, params)` вҖ” the template fns in TASK-001 already produce the multi-line `\n`-joined output
Verify the existing fabric-hint.cjs test suite still passes (substring contracts intact) вҖ” this is the regression gate

reference.pattern: Existing lib-require precedent in fabric-hint.cjs (search for `require('./lib/...')` patterns); test-substring contract documented in the comments at lines 600-604 and 643-650 of fabric-hint.cjs
reference.examples: Comment at lines 600-604 explicitly enumerates the substring contract вҖ” use this as the assertion checklist

criteria: File `packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs` no longer contains the literal strings `рҹ“Ӣ Fabric: и·қдёҠж¬ЎеҪ’жЎЈ`, `рҹ“Ӣ Fabric: е·Із§ҜзҙҜ`, `рҹ“Ӣ Fabric: зҹҘиҜҶеә“иҠӮзӮ№ж•°`, `рҹ“Ӣ Fabric: д»ҺжңӘиҝҗиЎҢ lint жЈҖжҹҘ`, `рҹ“Ӣ Fabric: е·І ${days} еӨ©жңӘи·‘ lint жЈҖжҹҘ` (all 5 banners now flow through renderBanner)

All pre-existing tests under `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- fabric-hint` PASS (anti-regression: substring contracts on `'25.0h'`, `'йҳҲеҖј'`, `'${count} жқЎ'`, `'${nodeCount}/${threshold}'`, `'fabric-archive'`, `'fabric-review'`, `'fabric-import'`, `'fabric doctor --lint'`)
Behavioral expectation: a workspace with `fabric_language: 'en'` in fabric-config.json now sees English banner text from all 5 signals; default (`match-existing`) preserves prior English fallback

rationale.chosen_approach: Resolve `variant` once per main() call and thread it through вҖ” avoids re-reading the config file 5 times per hook invocation, keeps the banner-i18n lib pure (no fs in render path)
alternatives_considered: Resolve variant inside renderBanner() each call (rejected: 5x fs reads per hook fire is wasteful)
Module-level cache in banner-i18n.cjs (rejected: hook process is short-lived, cache adds no value and complicates testing)
decision_factors: Hook latency budget is tight (Stop hook blocks the user-visible Claude turn)
Test substring contracts are load-bearing вҖ” translation MUST preserve them
rationale.tradeoffs: Threading `variant` through evaluator function signatures touches 4 call sites; less invasive than alternatives but does change function arity

manual_checks: Set `fabric_language: 'en'` in a test workspace's fabric-config.json, trigger Signal A by setting hoursElapsed past threshold, run the hook, confirm English banner appears
Set `fabric_language: 'zh-CN-hybrid'`, trigger Signal C, confirm Chinese narrative + verbatim `/fabric-import` token
success_metrics: All existing fabric-hint tests pass without modification (anti-regression)
5 banner blocks deleted, replaced by 5 renderBanner calls
